blockingIssues.description: snipsnap/curation/engine.py accepts LLM-provided source_file/start/end values without validating source membership and timestamp bounds against input transcriptions before persisting cut lists.
snipsnap/cli.py currently exits non-zero only when every file fails; mixed-success batches with one or more failed files still exit 0, violating the non-zero-on-errors contract.
snipsnap/cli.py catches only mapped CurationError subclasses; non-mapped OpenAI SDK failures can bubble as raw exceptions/tracebacks instead of clear user-facing curation errors.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify RED-first procedure for bootstrap/setup and CLI features, and require skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false when workers intentionally deviate from strict tests-first sequencing.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Repeated across reviews for project-setup, transcription-engine, cli-transcribe, and cli-status-help where implementation edits preceded tests but handoffs still marked followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Either enforce explicit manual verification evidence for engine features or document an allowed N/A path when manual checks are impractical, to align procedure with observed execution.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: curation-engine review noted manual verification is required by skill text but handoff recorded only automated commands while reporting followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance to avoid patching imported-but-unused symbols in tests; mocks should target the actual call site to prevent vacuous assertions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: cli-curate review found tests/test_cli.py patches snipsnap.cli.save_cut_list even though persistence is executed in snipsnap.curation.engine.save_cut_list.

rejectedObservations.observation: Exclude @pytest.mark.integration tests from default test command in .factory/services.yaml.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: current suite is fast/deterministic in this repo state and no validator instability was observed from running the full configured test command.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document stem-based transcription storage collision behavior in shared library docs.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-resolved: current storage implementation uses stem+hash keys, so this caveat is outdated.

rejectedObservations.observation: Strengthen AGENTS.md enforcement that CLI remains a thin interface over engines.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous/normative: observation is architectural preference without concrete failing behavior in current validators.
